generated_oml:
// C1: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component between motor and cycloidal gearbox for torque amplification"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing high gear reduction and smooth motion for the first axis"
]

// C2: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted encoder on the motor shaft measuring motor position and angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring gearwheel rotational position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearwheelPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor measuring motor phase current (I_M) via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C3: Data Transmission
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearwheelPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionData
]

instance GearwheelAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearwheelPositionData
]

instance DerivedGearwheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorTorqueData, MotorAngularVelocityData
]

instance DerivedCycloidalOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedGearwheelTorqueData
]

instance DerivedCycloidalOutputVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearwheelAngularVelocityData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MQTTProtocolStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance RobotDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorTorqueData, MotorAngularVelocityData, DerivedGearwheelTorqueData, DerivedCycloidalOutputTorqueData
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StructuralSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) describing the first axis as composition of Motor, Gearbox, and CycloidalGearbox components with rotational flows"
]

instance FrictionCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocolStream
]

instance FrictionStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics with temperature dependency"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocolStream
]

instance FrictionDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Dahl friction characteristics for high-speed applications"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocolStream
]

instance FrictionLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing LuGre friction model with hysteresis effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocolStream
]

instance SystemDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model simulating ideal gearbox behavior without friction components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocolStream
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motor position data from encoder measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionCoulombViscousModel, FrictionStribeckModel, FrictionDahlModel, FrictionLuGreModel
]

instance MeasuredGearwheelPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time gearwheel position data from secondary encoder measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SystemDynamicsModel
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motor phase current data from SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionCoulombViscousModel, FrictionStribeckModel, FrictionDahlModel, FrictionLuGreModel
]

instance SimulatedMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor position data generated by friction models for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionCoulombViscousModel, FrictionStribeckModel, FrictionDahlModel, FrictionLuGreModel
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel position data derived from friction-free system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemDynamicsModel
]

instance FrictionLossAnalysisData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived data showing friction-induced position deviations between measured and simulated values"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorPositionData, SimulatedMotorPositionData
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data comparing measured vs simulated torque/velocity to optimize control parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData, DerivedGearwheelTorqueData, MotorAngularVelocityData, DerivedCycloidalOutputVelocityData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelBasedSystemsEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling framework for structural and behavioral modeling of the robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralSysMLModel
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink platform for executable simulation models of friction and system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionCoulombViscousModel, FrictionStribeckModel, FrictionDahlModel, FrictionLuGreModel, SystemDynamicsModel
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTProtocolStream, RobotDynamicsModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization platform for comparing measured vs simulated data traces and operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance ControlAlgorithmOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for comparing measured vs simulated data to adjust friction models and control parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterOptimizationAction
]

instance DynamicModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time capability for dynamic exchange of friction models during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousAdaptationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of friction losses (static, kinetic, viscous) and their impact on robot motion accuracy"
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of torque and angular velocity control parameters based on friction model comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Proactive identification of wear, tool changes, or environmental factors affecting friction behavior through visualization dashboard"
]

instance ParameterOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven refinement of friction models and control parameters to minimize motion inaccuracies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ContinuousAdaptationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adaptation of friction models during operation to account for wear, tool changes, or operational conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator, CycloidalGearboxActuator,
    MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor,
    StructuralSysMLModel, SystemDynamicsModel,
    FrictionCoulombViscousModel, FrictionStribeckModel, FrictionDahlModel, FrictionLuGreModel,
    MQTTProtocolStream, RobotDynamicsModel,
    RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationDashboardService,
    ControlAlgorithmOptimizationService, DynamicModelExchangeService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and near-real-time**:
  - Data acquisition and processing occur at **high frequency** (implied by live operational data integration and continuous friction identification).
  - The digital shadow is designed for **low-latency synchronization** between physical and virtual systems, with no explicit time granularity specified beyond real-time operational data streams."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - A **centralized digital shadow** for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, incorporating:
    - **Physical asset**: The robot’s first axis (motor, gearbox, gear transmission).
    - **Virtual models**: SysML structural/behavioral models and MathWorks Simulink simulations.
    - **Data traces**: Measured and derived data streams (I_M, τ_M, ω_M, τ_G, ω_G, τ_out).
    - **Processing components**: Simulation models (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) that compute friction-affected outputs for comparison with live measurements.
  - **Unified dashboard**: Visualizes data traces (measured vs. simulated) for friction analysis and control algorithm optimization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As designed (ideal)**: Structural and behavioral models (SysML Block Definition Diagram) describe the robot’s first axis, including motor, gearbox, and gear transmission components.
  - **As manufactured (operational)**: Live operational data (sensor streams, CNC controller outputs) is integrated to simulate and analyze friction behavior in real-world conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Traceability**: Each data point is linked to its source (e.g., motor encoder, simulation model) via metadata, ensuring semantic support for understanding friction behavior.
  - **Multi-physics awareness**: Combination of **white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models** to capture static, kinetic, and viscous effects, accounting for load, temperature, and wear.
  - **Verification/validation**:
    - Comparison of **measured vs. simulated data traces** (e.g., motor output, gearwheel output) to validate model accuracy.
    - Use of **two encoders per axis** (motor and gearbox) to reduce positional uncertainty and improve friction analysis.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Implicit in the continuous refinement of friction models during operation, leveraging live operational data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DT) is established via:
  - **MQTT protocol**: Enables real-time data streaming from the robot’s CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl) to the DT.
  - **Data aggregation**: Derived data (e.g., torque, angular velocity) is computed from measured inputs (I_M, angles) using robot-specific dynamics models.
  - **SysML/Simulink integration**: Structural and behavioral models are implemented in SysML (for design) and MathWorks Simulink (for simulation), ensuring compatibility with the robot’s control architecture."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **Modeling standards**: SysML for structural/behavioral modeling and MathWorks Simulink for simulation.
  - **Digital shadow reference model**: Conforms to the **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** (UML class diagram) from Kritzinger et al. [32] and Michael et al. [15], including:
    - Purpose-driven design (friction analysis).
    - Data traces (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out, ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out).
    - Three types of models: Engineering (SysML), Simulation (Simulink), and Data Calculation.
    - Traceability via metadata and processing components."
]
